hero.name: Mikhailo Kravchuk
hero.description: I build high-performance web applications, architect Telegram & Discord bot systems, and design robust database solutions that scale.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Full-stack developer with a passion for clean code and elegant solutions
about.bio: I'm a full-stack developer specializing in building scalable web applications, intelligent bot ecosystems, and high-performance database architectures. My work sits at the intersection of design and engineering — delivering products that are both visually compelling and technically sound.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Crafting responsive, SEO-optimized web applications with a focus on clean UI and peak performance. From landing pages to full-stack platforms.

bots.title: Bot Ecosystems
bots.description: Architecting complex Telegram & Discord bots: from automated payment gateways and community management to deep API integrations and custom admin panels.

db.title: Database Architecture
db.description: Designing scalable SQL/NoSQL schemas focused on data integrity, high availability, and query optimization for demanding production workloads.

projects.subtitle: A selection of work I'm proud of
